instances.title: Instances
instances.emptyDesc: Create your first instance to play Minecraft.

instanceDetail.name: Name
instanceDetail.hooksDesc: Commands run in the instance directory. Placeholders: {placeholder}
instanceDetail.deleteBody: {name} will be permanently deleted. All worlds, mods and settings will be lost.
instanceDetail.noLogs: No logs — start the instance to see logs
instanceDetail.installSaved: Installation settings saved. Will be applied on next launch.

discover.title: Discover
discover.modpackNote: Modpacks can currently only be installed directly via Modrinth.

skinManager.title: Skin Manager
skinManager.noPresetsDesc: Import your current Mojang skin or upload a custom file.
skinManager.deleteConfirmDesc: This skin will be permanently deleted.
skinManager.invalidSkin: Invalid skin file (must be 64×64 or 64×32 PNG)
skinManager.subtitle: Manage your Minecraft skins
skinManager.rateLimit: Mojang API rate limit reached – please wait a moment and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.javaLocalHint: Nova Launcher can download and manage Java independently from your system Java. Click "Install" to automatically download the required JRE.
settings.impAutoCompressDesc: New screenshots are automatically converted to JPEG after the game exits — saves disk space and makes sharing easier.
settings.impScreenshotSyncDesc: Screenshots from all instances are additionally copied to a shared folder so you have everything in one place.
settings.impSavesSyncDesc: The saves folder is shared across all instances — game saves are available instantly in every instance.
settings.impServersSyncDesc: The server list (servers.dat) is automatically synchronised across all instances.
settings.impConfigSyncDesc: Key bindings, graphics settings and other config files are kept in sync across all instances.
settings.impResourcePackSyncDesc: Resource packs are shared across all instances — no more downloading them multiple times.
settings.minimizeOnLaunchDesc: Minimize the launcher to the taskbar when Minecraft starts
settings.appFolderDesc: Storage location for instances and launcher data.
settings.appFolderHint: All files will be transferred to the new folder.
settings.colorPickerHint: Click the swatch to open the color picker
settings.ramHint: Used for new instances unless they have their own value.
settings.javaPathHint: Leave empty to use Java automatically from PATH.
settings.fullscreenDesc: Start instances in fullscreen by default
settings.hooksDesc: Commands run in the instance directory. Placeholders: {placeholder}
settings.versionFilterDesc: Controls which versions are shown in the instance creator.
settings.restartSetupDesc: Run the setup wizard again to change language, design, and account.
settings.jvmArgsHint: Space-separated JVM arguments applied to all new instances.
settings.impressumDisclaimer: Nova Launcher v0.1.0 · Not officially affiliated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft. Minecraft is a registered trademark of Mojang Studios AB.
settings.privacyIntro: Nova Launcher does not store any personal data on its own servers. All configuration data is stored exclusively locally on your device.
settings.privacyMicrosoftText: Sign-in uses the official Microsoft OAuth 2.0 flow. Tokens are stored encrypted in the system keychain, never in plaintext files.
settings.privacyMojangItem1: Profile name, UUID, skin/cape URLs, skin upload
settings.privacyCatboxText: Only when Discord Rich Presence is enabled and a custom instance icon is set, that image is uploaded anonymously to catbox.moe (Discord only accepts public URLs). No account, no personal data. The image is publicly accessible and stored permanently.
settings.privacyCatboxWarning: Do not use images with personal content as an instance icon when Discord RPC is enabled.
settings.privacyModrinthText: Search queries are sent to api.modrinth.com. No account data or personal information.
settings.privacyDiscordText: Communicates exclusively via a local socket connection. No internet traffic. Disabled by default.
settings.privacyGoogleText: When loading fonts, your IP address is transmitted to these CDNs.

oom.title: Out of memory
oom.suggestion: Increase the allocated RAM in the instance settings to at least 2–4 GB.

java_version.title: Wrong Java version
java_version.description: A mod or the game requires a different Java version than the one currently in use.
java_version.suggestion: Check which Java version is required for this MC version and adjust the Java path in the instance settings.

duplicate_mods.title: Duplicate mods
duplicate_mods.description: Multiple versions of the same mod were found.
duplicate_mods.suggestion: Open the Mods tab and remove duplicate mod files.

mixin_error.title: Mixin error
mixin_error.description: A mod mixin could not be applied — often caused by incompatibility between mods or the wrong mod version.
mixin_error.suggestion: Update all mods or disable recently added mods to narrow down the conflict.

mod_compat.title: Mod incompatibility
mod_compat.description: One or more mods are not compatible with the current Minecraft version or with each other.
mod_compat.suggestion: Check the mod list for compatibility notes and update outdated mods via the updates tab.

missing_dep.title: Missing dependency
missing_dep.description: A required library or mod dependency is missing.
missing_dep.suggestion: Make sure all required mods (e.g. Fabric API, GeckoLib) are installed in the instance.

missing_files.title: Missing game files
missing_files.description: Game assets or libraries are missing or corrupted.
missing_files.suggestion: Repair the instance via Settings → Installation → Repair instance.

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.description: The Microsoft account could not be verified.
auth.suggestion: Check your internet connection or sign in again in settings.

system_resources.title: System resources exhausted
system_resources.description: The operating system could not reserve enough memory or threads.
system_resources.suggestion: Reduce the allocated RAM or close other programs.

driver.title: GPU driver crash
driver.description: The GPU driver or OpenGL caused a fatal error.
driver.suggestion: Update your graphics driver. Try removing OptiFine or Sodium, or switch the OpenGL version in the instance JVM arguments.

shader.title: Shader compilation error
shader.description: A shader pack could not be compiled.
shader.suggestion: Disable or remove the shader pack. Make sure the shader pack is compatible with your Minecraft version.

corrupt_save.title: Corrupt world / chunk
corrupt_save.description: A chunk or world could not be loaded — the file may be corrupted.
corrupt_save.suggestion: Try loading a different world or delete the affected chunk using a chunk editor like MCEdit.

lwjgl.title: Display / LWJGL error
lwjgl.description: LWJGL or GLFW could not create an OpenGL window.
lwjgl.suggestion: Update your graphics driver. On Linux: make sure OpenGL libraries are installed (e.g. mesa-libGL).

config_parse.title: Configuration error
config_parse.description: A mod config file contains a syntax error or is corrupted.
config_parse.suggestion: Delete the affected config file in the instance's config folder — it will be recreated on the next launch.
